CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the national performance database. Do not change this field or hide it from the layout. Auto-calculates when the Certify Income button is pressed. Certified Annual Income (Gross) / Certified AMI for Household Size.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-calculates when the Certify Income button is pressed. Certified Annual Income (Gross) / Certified AMI for Household Size.
CustomField.label: Certified Percent of AMI (Gross)
